title: toolant Concrete Drill Bit Set & Masonry Drill Bit Set, Shockproof Hammer Drill Bit Set (5pcs) for Concrete/Glass/Brick/Plastic/Cement/Tile, Industrial Strength Carbide Drill Bit Tip, 4-10mm Box of 5
features: FAST & DURABLE- TOOLANT High-quality YG8X tungsten carbide drill bit tip ensures durability and long life. Sharpened side edges maximize carbide surfact contact for faster drilling.
SATISFY ALL YOUR DEMAND - Includes 5pcs masonry drill bits with 5 different sizes of drill bits, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm 8mm, 10mm, suitable for home DIY and various drilling needs.
SHOCKPROOF STRUCTURE -Provides excellent stability, ensuring accurate and smooth drilling. Very suitable for drilling masonry materials.
WIDELY USED - TOOLANT Concrete drill bit set is ideal for drilling holes in concrete, brick, glass, ceramic, tile and cement.
WARRANTY - TOOLANT genuine masonry&concrete drill bit set. Full refund or replacement offered. Do not hesitate to contact us via massage for any issues.
